Class AtomicFloat

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Number
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicFloat
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class AtomicFloat extends Number implements Serializable
A float value that can be updated atomically. Internally stores an int.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AtomicFloat()
    Creates a new AtomicFloat with initial value 0.0.
    AtomicFloat(float initialValue)
    Creates a new AtomicFloat with the given initial value.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    final float
    addAndGet(float delta)
    Atomically adds the given value to current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).
    final boolean
    compareAndSet(float expectedValue, float newValue)
    Atomically sets the value to newValue if the current value == expectedValue, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).
    final float
    decrementAndGet()
    Atomically decrements the current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).
    double
    doubleValue()
     
    float
    floatValue()
     
    final float
    get()
    Returns the current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.getVolatile(Object...).
    final float
    getAndAdd(float delta)
    Atomically adds the given value to current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).
    final float
    getAndDecrement()
    Atomically decrements the current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).
    final float
    getAndIncrement()
    Atomically increments the current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).
    final float
    getAndSet(float newValue)
    Atomically sets the value to the given value and returns the old value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.getAndSet(Object...).
    final float
    getAndUpdate(it.unimi.dsi.fastutil.floats.FloatUnaryOperator updateFunction)
    Atomically updates (with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...)) the current value with the results of applying the given function, returning the updated value.
    final float
    incrementAndGet()
    Atomically increments the current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).
    int
    intValue()
     
    final void
    lazySet(float newValue)
    Sets the value to the given value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.setRelease(Object...).
    long
    longValue()
     
    final void
    set(float newValue)
    Sets the value to the given value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.setVolatile(Object...).
    String
    toString()
     
    final float
    updateAndGet(it.unimi.dsi.fastutil.floats.FloatUnaryOperator updateFunction)
    Atomically updates (with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...)) the current value with the results of applying the given function, returning the updated value.
    final boolean
    weakCompareAndSetPlain(float expectedValue, float newValue)
    Possibly atomically sets the value to newValue if the current value == expectedValue, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.weakCompareAndSetPlain(Object...).

  • Constructor Details

    • AtomicFloat

      public AtomicFloat()
      Creates a new AtomicFloat with initial value 0.0.

    • AtomicFloat

      public AtomicFloat(float initialValue)
      Creates a new AtomicFloat with the given initial value.
      Parameters:
      initialValue - the initial value

  • Method Details

    • get

      public final float get()
      Returns the current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.getVolatile(Object...).
      Returns:
      the current value

    • set

      public final void set(float newValue)
      Sets the value to the given value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.setVolatile(Object...).
      Parameters:
      newValue - the new value

    • lazySet

      public final void lazySet(float newValue)
      Sets the value to the given value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.setRelease(Object...).
      Parameters:
      newValue - the new value

    • getAndSet

      public final float getAndSet(float newValue)
      Atomically sets the value to the given value and returns the old value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.getAndSet(Object...).
      Parameters:
      newValue - the new value
      Returns:
      the previous value

    • compareAndSet

      public final boolean compareAndSet(float expectedValue, float newValue)
      Atomically sets the value to newValue if the current value == expectedValue, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).
      Parameters:
      expectedValue - the expected value
      newValue - the new value
      Returns:
      true if successful. False return indicates that the actual value was not equal to the expected value.

    • weakCompareAndSetPlain

      public final boolean weakCompareAndSetPlain(float expectedValue, float newValue)
      Possibly atomically sets the value to newValue if the current value == expectedValue, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.weakCompareAndSetPlain(Object...).
      Parameters:
      expectedValue - the expected value
      newValue - the new value
      Returns:
      true if successful

    • getAndIncrement

      public final float getAndIncrement()
      Atomically increments the current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).

      Equivalent to getAndAdd(1.0).

      Returns:
      the previous value

    • getAndDecrement

      public final float getAndDecrement()
      Atomically decrements the current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).

      Equivalent to getAndAdd(-1.0).

      Returns:
      the previous value

    • getAndAdd

      public final float getAndAdd(float delta)
      Atomically adds the given value to current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).
      Parameters:
      delta - the value to add
      Returns:
      the previous value

    • incrementAndGet

      public final float incrementAndGet()
      Atomically increments the current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).

      Equivalent to addAndGet(1.0).

      Returns:
      the updated value

    • decrementAndGet

      public final float decrementAndGet()
      Atomically decrements the current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).

      Equivalent to addAndGet(-1.0).

      Returns:
      the updated value

    • addAndGet

      public final float addAndGet(float delta)
      Atomically adds the given value to current value, with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...).
      Parameters:
      delta - the value to add
      Returns:
      the updated value

    • getAndUpdate

      public final float getAndUpdate(it.unimi.dsi.fastutil.floats.FloatUnaryOperator updateFunction)
      Atomically updates (with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...)) the current value with the results of applying the given function, returning the updated value. The function should be side-effect-free, since it may be re-applied when attempted updates fail due to contention among threads.
      Parameters:
      updateFunction - a side-effect-free function
      Returns:
      the previous value

    • updateAndGet

      public final float updateAndGet(it.unimi.dsi.fastutil.floats.FloatUnaryOperator updateFunction)
      Atomically updates (with memory effects as specified by VarHandle.compareAndSet(Object...)) the current value with the results of applying the given function, returning the updated value. The function should be side-effect-free, since it may be re-applied when attempted updates fail due to contention among threads.
      Parameters:
      updateFunction - a side-effect-free function
      Returns:
      the updated value

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

      public int intValue()
      Specified by:
      intValue in class Number

      public long longValue()
      Specified by:
      longValue in class Number

      public double doubleValue()
      Specified by:
      doubleValue in class Number

    • floatValue

      public float floatValue()
      Specified by:
      floatValue in class Number
